original: As a turret, this requires a crew member to fire it.\n\nMissiles are a common form of defense. Packing self-oxidizing fuel, they can give chase to targets in ways that dumb-fired bullets and streaking lasers cannot. Explosive warheads make them more effective against shielded foes than impact-focused weapons like rail and coil guns, but missiles still lag behind lasers and EM shells when it comes to raw, shield-purging power.
context: <<POS:07572689>> n="a missile turret",e.tooltip='As a turret, this requires a crew member to fire it.\\n\\nMiss'
